title: Processing Online Orders
content: All online orders must be reviewed in the order management system before packing. Verify payment status and item availability before sending the order to the packing queue.

title: Order Cancellation Requests
content: Customer service can cancel orders that have not yet entered the packing stage. If the order is already packed, coordinate with the warehouse team before confirming cancellation.

title: Refund Processing
content: Refunds should be initiated through the finance dashboard. Always verify the original order number and ensure the returned product has been marked as received.

title: Handling Damaged Returns
content: If a returned product is damaged, document the damage with photos and mark the item in the inventory system as 'damaged return' before escalating to the warehouse manager.

title: Customer Complaint Handling
content: All customer complaints should be logged in the support system. Include order number, summary of the issue, and any actions taken.

title: Priority Support Tickets
content: Tickets labeled as 'priority' must be reviewed within 2 hours during business hours. These often involve payment errors or shipment problems.

title: Inventory Restocking
content: Restocking should be performed every morning before store opening. Employees must scan incoming items to update inventory levels.

title: Low Stock Alerts
content: Products with inventory below the defined threshold will appear in the low stock dashboard. Purchasing staff should reorder these items within 24 hours.

title: Receiving Supplier Shipments
content: When supplier shipments arrive, verify the packing list and inspect the items for damage before updating the warehouse inventory system.

title: Product Labeling
content: All new products must be labeled with SKU, price tag, and category before being placed on store shelves.

title: Price Adjustments
content: Price changes must be approved by the store manager before being applied to the system and shelf labels.

title: Handling Pre-Orders
content: Pre-order products must be separated from regular inventory and stored in the pre-order shelf until the official release date.

title: Gift Card Redemption
content: Gift cards can be redeemed online or in-store. Employees should verify the card balance in the POS system before completing the transaction.

title: POS System Login
content: Each employee must log in using their personal credentials. Shared accounts are not permitted.

title: End of Day Cash Register
content: At closing time, the cashier must count the cash drawer and reconcile it with the POS report.

title: Handling Fraud Suspicion
content: If an order appears fraudulent, flag it in the system and notify the finance team before shipping the order.

title: Shipping Label Printing
content: Shipping labels should be generated through the order management system to ensure correct tracking numbers.

title: Lost Package Procedure
content: If a package is reported lost, verify the tracking number and open an investigation with the shipping carrier.

title: Customer Loyalty Points
content: Customers earn loyalty points for each purchase. Points should automatically update after order completion.

title: Employee Discounts
content: Employees receive a discount on most products. The discount must be applied using the employee code at checkout.

title: Opening Store Procedure
content: The opening employee must unlock the store, turn on lights, check the POS system, and verify the store is clean before opening.

title: Closing Store Procedure
content: Before leaving, employees must turn off lights, secure inventory areas, and ensure the alarm system is activated.

title: Handling Customer Returns
content: Returns must include proof of purchase. Verify the product condition before processing the return.

title: Workshop Event Setup
content: Workshop materials should be prepared one hour before the event begins.

title: Workshop Instructor Guidelines
content: Instructors must provide a safety briefing and ensure all participants have the required tools.

title: Customer Account Assistance
content: If customers cannot log in, support staff can send a password reset link through the admin panel.

title: Product Category Updates
content: New product categories must be approved by the product manager before being added to the catalog.

title: Website Product Updates
content: Product descriptions and images must be updated in the product management system.

title: Handling Supplier Delays
content: If a supplier shipment is delayed, update the expected delivery date in the inventory system.

title: Reporting System Bugs
content: All technical issues must be reported in the internal issue tracker with clear reproduction steps.

title: Holiday Sales Preparation
content: Prepare promotional displays and verify discount codes before the sale begins.

title: Marketing Campaign Setup
content: Marketing campaigns must be scheduled in advance and approved by the marketing manager.

title: Customer Data Privacy
content: Employees must not share customer information outside authorized systems.

title: Password Security
content: Passwords must be at least 12 characters and changed every 90 days.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: All internal systems require two-factor authentication for login.

title: Handling Online Reviews
content: Customer service staff may respond to reviews using approved response templates.

title: Product Photography
content: New products should be photographed in the studio area before being listed online.

title: Packaging Standards
content: Fragile hobby items must be packed with bubble wrap and protective inserts.

title: Shipping Insurance
content: Orders above a defined value threshold must include shipping insurance.

title: Inventory Audits
content: Warehouse staff must perform a full inventory audit once per quarter.

title: Customer Email Responses
content: Support emails should be answered within one business day.

title: Internal Communication Tools
content: Employees should use the company messaging platform for daily communication.

title: Escalating Customer Issues
content: If an issue cannot be resolved within one interaction, escalate it to the support manager.

title: Managing Backorders
content: Backordered items should remain in the system until stock arrives.

title: Shipping Address Changes
content: Address changes can be made only if the order has not yet shipped.

title: Packaging Fragile Models
content: Model kits with delicate parts must be double boxed.

title: Supplier Contact Protocol
content: All supplier communication should be documented in the purchasing system.

title: Receiving Returns
content: Returned packages must be opened and inspected within 24 hours.

title: Damaged Inventory Reporting
content: Any damaged inventory must be logged immediately.

title: Store Display Maintenance
content: Displays should be checked daily to ensure products are organized.

title: Product Bundles
content: Bundle products must be assembled before being listed for sale.

title: Handling Large Orders
content: Orders containing more than 10 items should be verified before packing.

title: Handling Customer Suggestions
content: Suggestions should be logged and reviewed during monthly meetings.

title: Supplier Invoice Verification
content: Invoices must be checked against delivery records.

title: Stock Transfers
content: Stock transfers between stores must be recorded in the inventory system.

title: Product Safety Guidelines
content: Ensure all hobby chemicals and paints follow safety regulations.

title: Event Registration
content: Customers can register for events through the website.

title: Training New Employees
content: New employees should complete onboarding training within the first week.

title: Handling Customer Feedback
content: Feedback should be categorized and reviewed monthly.

title: Inventory Shelf Organization
content: Items must be stored according to category and SKU order.

title: Tracking Warehouse Tasks
content: Warehouse tasks should be updated in the task management system.

title: Internal Documentation
content: All internal procedures should be documented in the knowledge base.

title: Email Signature Standards
content: Employees must use the standard company email signature.

title: Internal Meeting Notes
content: Meeting summaries should be shared with relevant teams.

title: Handling Urgent Orders
content: Urgent orders should be prioritized in the packing queue.

title: Label Printer Maintenance
content: Label printers must be cleaned weekly.

title: Store Cleanliness
content: Employees must keep the store floor clean and organized.

title: Handling Defective Products
content: Defective items must be removed from inventory.

title: Inventory Barcode Scanning
content: Always scan barcodes when moving items in inventory.

title: Customer Wait Time
content: Customer inquiries should be acknowledged quickly.

title: Store Music Policy
content: Background music should be kept at a moderate level.

title: Product Demonstrations
content: Demonstrations should follow safety guidelines.

title: Internal Announcements
content: Announcements should be posted in the employee portal.

title: Weekly Sales Report
content: Managers must review weekly sales metrics.

title: Stockroom Safety
content: Heavy items should be stored on lower shelves.

title: Handling Product Recalls
content: Immediately remove recalled products from shelves.

title: Shipping Carrier Contacts
content: Carrier contact info is stored in the logistics dashboard.

title: Handling Holiday Returns
content: Holiday return deadlines may be extended.

title: Packaging Supplies
content: Warehouse staff must monitor packaging supply levels.

title: Daily Sales Check
content: Daily sales reports should be reviewed each morning.

title: Customer Greeting
content: Employees should greet customers when they enter the store.

title: Handling Refund Disputes
content: Escalate disputes to the support manager.

title: Store Security Cameras
content: Cameras should remain active at all times.

title: Emergency Procedures
content: Follow emergency evacuation plans posted in the store.

title: Handling Online Chat Support
content: Chat responses should be concise and helpful.

title: Product Knowledge Training
content: Employees should stay updated on popular hobby products.

title: Warehouse Temperature Control
content: Maintain stable conditions for sensitive materials.

title: Supplier Quality Issues
content: Report quality problems to the purchasing manager.

title: Handling High Demand Products
content: Limit quantities per customer if required.

title: End of Month Reports
content: Finance compiles reports based on sales data.

title: Store WiFi Access
content: Employee WiFi credentials should not be shared.

title: Handling Media Requests
content: Refer all media inquiries to the marketing department.

title: Customer Photo Permissions
content: Ask permission before using customer photos in marketing.

title: Inventory Disposal
content: Unsellable items must be disposed of according to policy.

title: Internal Surveys
content: Employees may be asked to complete internal feedback surveys.

title: Managing Event Supplies
content: Event materials should be stored separately.

title: Updating Store Signage
content: Outdated promotional signs should be replaced.

title: Reporting Workplace Issues
content: Report workplace issues to HR immediately.

title: Weekly Team Meetings
content: Teams meet weekly to review operations.

title: Knowledge Base Updates
content: Employees should suggest updates when procedures change.
